title: Classic sliding window win 🚀
description: The shortest valid subarray is [4, 3], which reaches the target with length 2.

title: Single element hits instantly 🎯
description: A single 4 already meets the target, so the minimum length is 1.

title: No possible window here ❌
description: Even the full array sums to only 8, so no qualifying subarray exists.

title: Whole array needed 📦
description: You need every element to reach 15, so the answer is the full array length.

title: Tight window in the middle 🔍
description: The subarray [3, 5] hits the target with the smallest possible length of 2.

title: Edge case with one number ⚡
description: A one-element array can still be the perfect answer when it matches the target.

title: Single value still falls short 🌧️
description: When the only number is smaller than the target, no valid subarray exists.

title: Best answer appears right at the start 🏁
description: The first element alone hits the target, so the minimum window length is 1.

title: Best answer waits until the end 🎬
description: The final element forms the shortest valid subarray all by itself.

title: Pairs beat larger windows 🤝
description: The pair [5, 5] reaches the target faster than any longer window.

title: Three-step climb to the target 🪜
description: Every element is needed because no shorter contiguous part sums to 9.

title: Repeating numbers create a neat window 🔁
description: Any three consecutive 2s sum to 6, making 3 the smallest valid length.

title: Large value ends the search fast 💥
description: A single large number can immediately satisfy the target and minimize the answer.

title: Window shrinks after overshooting ✂️
description: After the sum grows past the target, the smallest valid window becomes [10, 7].

title: Many small steps, one exact finish 🧩
description: The shortest valid subarray is [3, 4, 5], which totals exactly 12.

title: Target larger than total sum 🚫
description: Since the whole array sums to only 30, there is no qualifying window.

title: Two big neighbors save the day 🛟
description: The shortest valid subarray is [6, 7], which reaches 13 with length 2.

title: Exact target in the middle lane 🎯
description: A single middle element matches the target exactly, so the answer is 1.
